title: 8 Pcs 3D Mosaic Stickers Set Toy for Kids Adults,Fun DIY 3D Vehicles Theme Stickers with Tweezers,Sticky Crafts Activities Travel Toy for Aged 3 Years+ (Vehicles)
features: 3D Transportation Sticker Set: Dive into the creative world with 8 fun themes: fire engine, submarine, truck, car, ship, plane, rocket, bus! The Transportations designs for each theme are very vivid, and the colorful stickers instantly capture the attention of children.

Easy to Use: The 3D sticker set comes with a pair of tweezers for precise placement of stickers. The 3D stickers are easy to apply and remove without leaving any residue. Using tweezers to remove and paste sticker blocks can also exercise children's fine hand dexterity.

High Quality: This 3D sticker includes two parts: a cardboard base and a sticker. The cardboard is made of high-quality and thick materials, which are durable and not easily damaged. Stickers can be repeatedly pasted, even if they are pasted incorrectly, it's okay, we can start over!

Puzzle Toys: The cardboard base and sticker blocks are numbered and correspond one-to-one. The shape of each sticker is different and needs to be oriented in a fixed direction to perfectly match the position on the cardboard. This can exercise children's logical thinking ability and promote their intellectual development.

Ideal Gift for Children over 3 Years Old: the ideal gift for birthdays or holidays! Providing engaging and imaginative games for extended periods of time, allowing children to participate happily anywhere - this is the perfect travel companion they love!
